official_public_docs_or_observed_endpoin: Observed BrassRing board bootstrap plus matched jobs JSON.
source_discovery_method: manual source-specific discovery required before public enablement
list_fetch_method: brittle source-specific fetch only in canary mode until certified
detail_fetch_method: disabled unless raw fixture and parser test prove detail extraction
pagination_method: no broad pagination until source shape is certified
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: list-payload: Use requisition/job id when source exposes it.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: pending-research: Portal-specific columns must be fixture-certified.
country_region_city_rule: pending-research: Portal-specific columns must be fixture-certified.
remote_type_rule: pending-research: Use explicit source text only.
posting_date_rule: pending-research: Reject boolean/placeholders; use only real date columns.
rate_limit: quarantine-only or disabled; canary budget only

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: source canary only; public writes require raw parser fixture, expected normalized fixture, and passing parser tests

quarantine_reason: hold/quarantine recommendation: missing strict raw parser fixture; high missing normalized geo; high weak remote classification; source id reliability unproven/weak; canonical URL reliability unproven

runner_interface.discover: manual source-specific discovery required before public enablement
runner_interface.fetchList: brittle source-specific fetch only in canary mode until certified
runner_interface.fetchDetail: disabled unless raw fixture and parser test prove detail extraction
runner_interface.normalize: server/ingestion/parserContract.js normalized posting shape plus source-specific normalizer
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: add or run bounded detail-refetch certification for missing geo/remote evidence
certification_blockers: missing strict raw parser fixture; high missing normalized geo; high weak remote classification; source id reliability unproven/weak; canonical URL reliability unproven
